ogTitle: Caffreys Flat vs Calala: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caffreys Flat and Calala.
heading: Caffreys Flat vs Calala — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caffreys Flat, New South Wales and Calala, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Calala has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Caffreys Flat (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caffreys Flat or Calala safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caffreys Flat has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Calala scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caffreys Flat scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Calala scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caffreys Flat or Calala?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Calala has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
